# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the storage account"
      }
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL server"
      }
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Cosmos DB account"
      }
    },
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the function app"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments",
          "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId())))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ba92f5b4-2d17-40c3-ba3e-6b7eaf1b189b",
            "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "family": "A",
        "name": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "objectId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": ["all"],
              "keys": ["all"],
              "certificates": ["all"]
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments",
          "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId())))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/f25f4ed1-7ac8-40d1-a3fd-fbcf6196b7b4",
            "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "version": "12.0"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
          "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
          },
          "resources": [
            {
              "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/providers/roleAssignments",
              "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
              "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId())))]",
              "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'default')]"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-4b7e-ba57-5be44fe03242",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/providers/roleAssignments",
          "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId())))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/f29be2d6-3810-44b1-9c63-a6e1cf9a51d1",
            "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-15",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "kind": "GlobalDocumentDB",
      "properties": {
        "consistencyPolicy": {
          "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
        },
        "locations": [
          {
            "failoverPriority": 0,
            "id": "[resourceGroup().location]"
          }
        ],
        "databaseAccountOfferType": "Standard"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments",
          "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(uniqueString(resourceId())))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/fdef0e9b-81fe-4c7a-a52c-673f3cf8de70",
            "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01').identity.principalId, 'Full']"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/web')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "appSettings": [
          {
            "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
            "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
          },
          {
            "name": "AzureFunctionsJobHost__AzureWebJobsSecretStorageType",
            "value": "Files"
          },
          {
            "name": "AzureFunctionsJobHost__Extensions__EventHubsConnectionStringSetting",
            "value": "[concat('Endpoint=sb://', parameters('functionAppName'), '.servicebus.windows.net/;SharedAccessKeyName=RootManageSharedAccessKey;SharedAccessTokenSignature=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.EventHub/namespaces', parameters('functionAppName')), '2017-04-01').primaryConnectionString, ';EntityPath=', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2021-03-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Y1",
        "tier": "Dynamic"
      },
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      }
    }
  ]
}
